title: Field Identifier
text: Field Identifier ASCII string that marks a variable-length field. Technical Name: FID Expected Value: String. Default Value: None Description Use this definition only if the Identification Type species that a string identifier will be used, either alone or in combination with a binary length. For nonprinting ASCII, use the decimal value (for example, ^28). Applies to Modeled Field Interface Related Links Variable-Length Fields Variable-length fields store only the actual data in the field, and not the trailing spaces that would be added for a fixed-length field. Identification Type The method used to identify the beginning of a subfield. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
